plugins.name: ado
plugins.description: Experimental: Azure DevOps work item management, build monitoring, and pull request creation. May change. Feedback: github.com/microsoft/hve-core/issues

plugins.name: coding-standards
plugins.description: Experimental: Coding instructions and pre-PR code review agents for bash, Bicep, C#, PowerShell, Python, Rust, Terraform. AS-IS. Feedback: github.com/microsoft/hve-core/issues

plugins.name: data-science
plugins.description: Experimental: Eval dataset creation, data spec generation, Jupyter notebooks, and Streamlit dashboards. AS-IS. Feedback: github.com/microsoft/hve-core/issues

plugins.name: design-thinking
plugins.description: Experimental: Design Thinking coaching identity and methodology across nine methods. Available only via pre-release channel. Breaking changes possible. Feedback: github.com/microsoft/hve-core/issues

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: Experimental: GitHub issue discovery, triage, sprint planning, and backlog execution agents and prompts. AS-IS. Feedback: github.com/microsoft/hve-core/issues

plugins.name: hve-core
plugins.description: Experimental: HVE Core RPI workflow with Git commit, merge, setup, and PR prompts. AS-IS. Feedback: github.com/microsoft/hve-core/issues

plugins.name: hve-core-all
plugins.description: Experimental: Full bundle of all HVE Core agents, prompts, instructions, and skills. AS-IS. Feedback: github.com/microsoft/hve-core/issues

plugins.name: project-planning
plugins.description: Experimental: PRDs, BRDs, ADRs, and architecture diagrams. AS-IS. Feedback: github.com/microsoft/hve-core/issues

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Experimental: Security review, planning, incident response, risk assessment, and vulnerability analysis. AS-IS. Feedback: github.com/microsoft/hve-core/issues
